title: Add forge config validate
description: Add forge config validate to statically validate forge.bootstrap.toml without running local tool, secret, or registry probes. Keep product direction in the global RFD-style spec, update local docs, implementation, and tests.

title: Add repo style and review guides
description: Distill local Rust, testing, documentation-comment, PR-review, and design-doc-review guidance into repo-owned docs for forge-cli, including explicit agent handoff gates before approval or commit.
